title: Conference Producer
description:
The International Quality and Productivity Center (IQPC) is an international events business that specializes in the production, sales and delivery of B2B C-Level Conferences. A leader in the conference arena with offices in 8 countries, IQPC delivers over 1500 conferences annually. http://www.iqpc.sg/Location/Asia

  • Exciting and rewarding career prospects
  • Great working environment and exciting learning opportunities in a dynamic environment

Your Responsibilities:

The Conference Producer needs to research, develop and project manage a portfolio of launch and repeat events. Key facets of the role include:

  • Responsible for creating content through industry research by speaking with multiple Senoir Executives in the industry
  • In charge of translating commercial knowledge obtained through research into agendas, value propositions and department briefs via copywriting
  • Responsible for inviting Key Excutives in the industry to speak at events
  • In charge of the overall running of the onsite event, network with Senior Executives and develop future pipeline and opportunities
  • In charge of overall management of the entire Project, and work closely with internal teams to develop and execute comprehensive cross-functional strategies
  • Responsible for budget controls for event cost and revenue
  • Responsible for creating original, engaging sales copies for event brochures, website and associated promotion materials

The Ideal Candidate:

  • Good interpersonal and communication skills
  • Strong analytical skills
  • Confident and comfortable in communicating over the phone
  • Good written skills
  • Detail-oriented
  • Able to work independently, and thrive in a team environment

postedCompany.description:
IQPC is an international events business that specializes in the production, sales and delivery of B2B C-Level Conferences. Based in Robinson Road, our Singapore office is populated by a cosmopolitan mixture of multilingual and talented professionals. The office is active in most industry sectors, but particularly prominent in Shared Services and Finance, Infrastructure, Oil and Gas and Defence.

Fast paced, young and dynamic we promote a ‘work hard, play hard’ culture where employees are supported, developed and recognised for their contributions both as individuals and teams. 

“Identifying, developing and retaining talented staff is key to our success. The conference business is like no other environment, the pace and intensity is high but so are the rewards. Supporting our staff through training and incentives programs, plus promoting an inclusive and dynamic culture makes this an exciting place to work”. 

Liz Ong, Country Manager Singapore
postedCompany.name: IQPC WORLDWIDE PTE LTD
